Symbol Search API

Search symbols and company names.

About Symbol Search API

Find companies by partial ticker or company name.

Endpoint:

https://financialmodelingprep.com/stable/search-symbol?query=AAPL&exchange=NASDAQ&limit=10

Symbol Search API Parameters

query
Search text. Required.
exchange
Exchange code such as NASDAQ or NYSE.
  • limit (integer): Maximum rows returned.
